articles.title: Slay the Spire 2 Dev Adjusts Update That Led To Review Bombing
articles.title_tr: Slay the Spire 2 Dev Adjusts Update That Led To Review Bombing
articles.summary: Earlier this month, Mega Crit shared the first major update for Slay the Spire 2, which included nerfs and buffs that angered some players enough to review bomb the game. Now, Mega Crit is rolling back some of those changes that led to the pushback.Mega Crit made the announcement on social media and alluded to the review bombing while jokingly telling players they could "lower your Shivs." The message also touted the in-game feedback as "much appreciated." Players can access that feature by hitting F2, and the patch notes indicate that the feedback character limit has been raised from 500 to 8,000.Another patch just dropped on the Beta Branch, with lots of balance adjustments from last week's beta patch!Notably: Prepared is back! So you can lower your Shivs 😅 But seriously, the in-game feedback we've received is much appreciated.Patch notes: https://t.co/gqqIU79ywd  — Mega Crit ⚔️ Slay the Spire 2 Out Now! (@MegaCrit) March 27, 2026              After reminding players that nothing is set in stone during the game's beta period, Mega Crit added that the most recent changes to Prepared, Borrowed Time, and Capture Spirit have been rolled back.Continue Reading at GameSpot

Players can access that feature by hitting F2, and the patch notes indicate that the feedback character limit has been raised from 500 to 8,000.Another patch just dropped on the Beta Branch, with lots of balance adjustments from last week's beta patch!Notably: Prepared is back! articles.title: Son dakika deprem mi oldu? Az önce deprem nerede oldu? İstanbul, Ankara, İzmir ve il il AFAD son depremler 28 Mart 2026
articles.title_tr: Son dakika deprem mi oldu? Az önce deprem nerede oldu? İstanbul, Ankara, İzmir ve il il AFAD son depremler 28 Mart 2026
articles.summary: Son depremler... Son dakika deprem mi oldu? Az önce deprem nerede oldu? İstanbul, Ankara, İzmir ve il il AFAD son depremler.. 28 Mart 2026 deprem son dakika haberleri haberin detayında... Artçı deprem mi oldu? Son deprem büyüklüğü ne kadar? Yakınımdaki depremler nelerdir? Anlık deprem mi oldu? Son dakika canlı deprem Türkiye haritası.. Kandilli Rasathanesi ve Deprem Araştırma Enstitüsü ve AFAD deprem haberleri.. İstanbul'da deprem mi oldu? Ankara'da deprem mi oldu? İzmir'de deprem mi oldu? Hangi illerde deprem oldu ve hissedildi? Bugün deprem mi oldu? Deprem ne zaman ve kaç şiddetinde oldu? En son hangi bölgede deprem oldu? Deprem haberleriyle ilgili en çok merak edilenlerin cevabı haberde..

articles.title: This Comfortable Nintendo Switch 2 Grip Is Discounted In Amazon's Spring Sale 2026 Event
articles.title_tr: This Comfortable Nintendo Switch 2 Grip Is Discounted In Amazon's Spring Sale 2026 Event
articles.summary: If you're looking for a more comfortable, ergonomic way to play your Nintendo Switch 2 in handheld mode, this Amazon Spring Sale deal on the Gammeefy JC400 Switch 2 Controller might appeal to you. While the thrid-party grip is usually priced at $47.49, it's down to $40 during Amazon's sale, which runs until March 31 (unless it sells out first).Gammeefy JC400 Switch 2 Controller$40 (was $47.49)           See at Amazon While it's wonderful to have the option to play Nintendo Switch 2 in docked, tabletop, or handheld mode, the Joy-Con 2 controllers aren't very ergonomic. That makes third-party products like the Gammeefy JC400 useful, as they make handheld mode play significantly more comfortably. You simply have to slot your Switch 2 into the controller without its Joy-Con 2s attached, and you can start playing.In addition to its ergonomic design, which offers a full-size grip on each side of the controller, the Gammeefy JC400 Switch 2 Controller also features Hall Effect joysticks that are less prone to stick drift. They can also be customized with unique lighting via a dedicated app called KeyLinker, and the controller has a claimed battery life of around 10 hours.Continue Reading at GameSpot

articles.title: Şampiyonluk aşkına saldır Bursaspor! Maç kaçta, hangi kanalda?
articles.title_tr: Şampiyonluk aşkına saldır Bursaspor! Maç kaçta, hangi kanalda?
articles.summary:
TFF 2. Lig’de adım adım şampiyonluğa ilerleyen Bursaspor, bugün Fethiyespor’a konuk olacak. Fethiye İlçe Stadı’nda oynanacak olan mücadele saat 16.00’da başlayacak. En yakın rakibine 5 puan atarak zirvedeki yerini sağlamlaştıran yeşil-beyazlılar, bu maçı da kazanıp puanını 70’e yükseltmeyi planlıyor.TFF 2. Lig Kırmızı Grup 30. hafta maçında Bursaspor deplasmanda Fethiyespor’la karşı karşıya gelecek.

Fethiye İlçe Stadı’nda oynanacak olan mücadele saat 16.00’da başlayacak.

Son 10 maçının 8’ini kazanan 2’sinde de berabere kalan yeşil-beyazlı takım, 67 puanla zirvede yer alıyor.

Bu serisini sürdürmek isteyen Bursaspor’da tek hedef galibiyet.

İki takım arasında oynanacak olan mücadele Bi Kanal ve AS TV’den naklen yayınlanacak.

TİMSAH 5’TE 5 PEŞİNDE

Son olarak eviden Güzide Gebzespor’u 2-0 mağlup eden Bursaspor, en yakın rakibi Aliağa ile arasında 5 puanlık farkı muhafaza etmişti.

Kalan son 5 maçını da kazanmak isteyen 4 mücadeleden 3 puan çıkarması halinde ise matematiksel olarak da şampiyonluğu garantileyecek olan yeşil-beyazlılar, sürprize yer vermek istemiyor.

Hedefsiz kalan rakip Fethiyespor ise 38 puanla 11. sırada bulunuyor.

articles.title: Save 48% On The A Court Of Thorns And Roses Paperback 5-Novel Box Set
articles.title_tr: Save 48% On The A Court Of Thorns And Roses Paperback 5-Novel Box Set
articles.summary: If you're looking to check out Sarah J. Maas's epic romantasy saga, A Court of Thorns and Roses, ahead of books six and seven launching in the next few months, you're in luck. The A Court of Thorns and Roses Paperback Box Set is currently available for just $50, down from its usual $95 retail price, thanks to Amazon's ongoing Spring Sale. The set includes paperback editions of the first five novels in the popular series, making it an easy way to catch up on the story thus far. It is also a part of Amazon's Buy Two Get One Free deal on select books, movies, and other items, allowing bookworms to get more bang for their buck while stocking up on summer reading. Just make sure you grab it soon; Amazon's Spring Sale only lasts until March 31, and there's a chance it could even sell out before the event is over.A Court Of Thorns and Roses Paperback Box Set$50 (was $95)The A Court Of Thorns and Roses Paperback Box Set includes:A Court of Thorns and RosesA Court of Mist and FuryA Court of Wings and RuinA Court of Frost and StarlightA Court of Silver Flames           See at Amazon A Court of Thorns and Roses first debuted in 2015, and follows the story of 19-year-old Feyre Archeron, a human huntress who is whisked away to the magical Fae world of Prythian after she kills a wolf who isn't just a wolf. The series has become increasingly popular over the years, especially amongst "booktok" creators on TikTok.Continue Reading at GameSpot

articles.title: The Mummy 4: John Hannah to Return as Jonathan, Brother of Rachel Weisz's Character Evelyn
articles.title_tr: The Mummy 4: John Hannah to Return as Jonathan, Brother of Rachel Weisz's Character Evelyn
articles.summary: John Hannah will reprise his role as Jonathan Carnahan, the unscrupulous brother of Rachel Weisz’s character Evelyn O'Connell, in The Mummy 4. Hannah appeared in the first three Mummy movies, although Maria Bello subbed for Weisz as Evy in the last entry.

articles.title: İran’dan Tel Aviv merkezine füze misillemesi: 1 ölü
articles.title_tr: İran’dan Tel Aviv merkezine füze misillemesi: 1 ölü
articles.summary: İran’ın, Tel Aviv başta olmak üzere İsrail’in merkezine yönelik art arda gerçekleştirdiği füze misillemelerinde 1 kişi hayatını kaybetti. Saldırılarda çok sayıda noktaya füze parçaları ve şarapneller düşerken, bölgede sirenler çaldı ve ekipler alarma geçti.

articles.title: The New PUBG Game Is Closing After Less Than 2 Months
articles.title_tr: The New PUBG Game Is Closing After Less Than 2 Months
articles.summary: Near the beginning of February, Krafton gave an early-access release to PUBG: Blindspot, a spin-off from PlayerUnknown's Battlegrounds. However, Blindspot won't make it to its two-month anniversary as the game is scheduled to shut down in just a few days.ARC Team's Sequoia Yang shared an announcement that PUBG: Blindspot will cease operations on March 30. "After careful consideration, we have come to the conclusion that we are no longer able to sustainably provide the level of experience we set out to deliver through Early Access," wrote Yang.Yang went on to thank players for their support and added that, "The ARC Team will take some time to regroup, and we hope to return with new experiences in the future."Continue Reading at GameSpot

articles.title: Yalova’da Matematik Yarışması Heyecanı: 29 Okul Kıyasıya Yarıştı
articles.title_tr: Yalova’da Matematik Yarışması Heyecanı: 29 Okul Kıyasıya Yarıştı
articles.summary: Yalova Termal Fen Lisesi’nin bu yıl 11’incisini düzenlediği “Ali Kuşçu Matematik Yarışması”, 29 ortaokulun katılımıyla gerçekleştirildi. Yarışmada dereceye giren öğrencilere ödülleri takdim edildi.
